V1.4.title: Trust boundaries
V1.4.note: Trust-boundary documentation is an architectural deliverable. /agentic-security:posture-management --api generates an API inventory you can annotate; /agentic-security:disaster-playbook produces an incident-response baseline.

commands.desc: Audit auth provider config (Clerk, NextAuth, Auth0, Lucia) for password-length policy.
Verify the auth provider hashes with bcrypt/argon2/scrypt and that no custom auth bypasses it.
Catch any plaintext or weakly-hashed credential persistence.
Verify MFA is enabled in the auth provider config.
Verify the auth provider mints session tokens with strong entropy (no DIY random).
Catch cookies set without Secure / HttpOnly / SameSite.
Adds safe defaults to cookie config where the framework allows it.
Broken access control, IDOR, mass assignment, multi-tenant scope checks.
Apply the fixes.
Detects missing zod/joi/yup validation on route handlers.
Apply the fixes.
SQLi detection across JS/TS, Python, Java, Go, C#, PHP.
Apply parameterized-query patches.
React dangerouslySetInnerHTML and other XSS sinks.
Generates a CSP header that hardens XSS exposure further.
Apply the fixes.
Catches console.log / logger.info of secrets/PII.
Catches NEXT_PUBLIC_ leaks.

V8.3.title: Encryption at rest

commands.desc: Catches unencrypted columns and direct DB connections that bypass RLS.

V8.3.note: Disk/volume-level encryption is a deploy-platform concern — see /agentic-security:deploy-check.

commands.desc: Verifies HTTPS, HSTS, and security headers on Vercel/Railway/Fly/Netlify/Cloudflare.

V13.1.title: API documentation

commands.desc: Generates an API inventory from your route handlers.

V13.1.note: Authoring the OpenAPI / GraphQL schema itself is a manual deliverable.

commands.desc: Generates a GitHub Action that runs SCA on every PR and fails on critical/high CVEs.
Daily Slack/Discord ping when a new CVE drops for any package you use.
